2606.24797.title: EG-VQA: Benchmarking Verifiable Video Question Answering with Grounded Temporal Evidence
2606.24797.paper_summary: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have yielded promising performance on video question answering (VideoQA). Nevertheless, existing benchmarks are predominantly evaluated through answer correctness, while the grounding of predictions in relevant video evidence remains largely unexamined. This disconnect between answer generation and evidence understanding motivates the construction of the Evidence-Grounded Video Question Answering Benchmark (EG-VQA), an open-ended evaluation protocol in which each QA pair is explicitly annotated with supporting temporal evidence, thereby requiring joint reasoning and precise evidence localization. EG-VQA is comprised of 2,067 videos and 11,838 QA pairs with fine-grained evidence annotations. To evaluate predicted evidence, Evidence-Grounded F1 (EG-F1) is introduced as a unified metric in which temporal alignment and semantic consistency against ground-truth evidence are jointly measured. Experimental evaluation reveals that even strong proprietary models struggle to accurately ground their predictions, exposing a fundamental discrepancy between answer correctness and faithful evidence localization. To bridge this gap, EG-Reasoner, an evidence-grounded reasoning model trained with explicit supervision, is proposed. State-of-the-art performance is achieved among open-source models, with results competitive against proprietary systems, particularly pronounced gains are observed on reasoning-intensive tasks such as counterfactual questions. These findings demonstrate that scaling alone is insufficient for robust video understanding and that structured evidence supervision is essential for the development of more reliable and interpretable VideoQA systems.
2606.24797.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視頻大型語言模型（Video-LLMs）方面的進展在視頻問答（VideoQA）中取得了令人鼓舞的表現。<lb/>然而，現有的基準主要通過答案的正確性進行評估，而預測在相關視頻證據中的基礎則仍然大部分未被檢視。<lb/>這種答案生成與證據理解之間的脫節促使了證據基礎視頻問答基準（EG-VQA）的構建，這是一種開放式的評估協議，其中每對問答都明確標註了支持的時間證據，從而要求聯合推理和精確的證據定位。<lb/>EG-VQA包含2,067個視頻和11,838對具有細粒度證據標註的問答對。<lb/>為了評估預測的證據，引入了證據基礎F1（EG-F1）作為統一指標，其中時間對齊和與真實證據的語義一致性被共同測量。<lb/>實驗評估顯示，即使是強大的專有模型也難以準確地將其預測與證據對應，暴露出答案正確性與忠實證據定位之間的根本差異。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，提出了EG-Reasoner，一種經過明確監督訓練的證據基礎推理模型。<lb/>在開源模型中實現了最先進的性能，並且與專有系統的結果具有競爭力，特別是在反事實問題等推理密集型任務上觀察到顯著的增益。<lb/>這些發現表明，僅僅擴展規模不足以實現穩健的視頻理解，結構化的證據監督對於開發更可靠和可解釋的VideoQA系統至關重要。
2606.24797.author: Linpeng Huang et.al.
2606.24797.authors: Linpeng Huang, Weixing Chen, Zexin Chen, Yang Liu, Liang Lin
